Defines template macros for MPU region base addresses, sizes, and disabled subregions.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines preprocessor macros for configuring memory protection unit (MPU) regions. It specifies base addresses, sizes, and disabled subregions for two distinct memory regions: `APP` and `WORKER`. The placeholders `@APP_BASE_ADDRESS@`, `@APP_SIZE@`, `@APP_DISABLED_SUBREGIONS@`, `@WORKER_BASE_ADDRESS@`, `@WORKER_SIZE@`, and `@WORKER_DISABLED_SUBREGIONS@` are intended to be replaced with actual values during the build process. These macros facilitate the configuration of memory protection settings in embedded systems, ensuring that specific memory regions are correctly defined and protected.
